title: stelis niesseniae
intro: Stelis niesseniae, also known as the orchid Stelis niesseniae, is a species of orchid native to Central America, particularly in Costa Rica and Panama. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds that exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Stelis niesseniae include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate oxidative stress, which may contribute to the prevention of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The plant is typically prepared in herbal tea or infusion form, allowing for the extraction of its active compounds and providing a natural remedy for various health concerns.
